name: mcp-secretary-pro
description: MCP server for the Secretary Pro persona.

never_does: send messages on the user's behalf
create calendar events without explicit confirmation
share contact details with third parties

tools.name: secretary_schedule
tools.description: Propose 3 time-zone-aware meeting slots plus a fallback. Drafts only — never books.

tools.name: secretary_remind
tools.description: Create time-aware reminder drafts. Output is a structured reminder envelope; the caller decides whether to commit it to a real reminder system.

tools.name: secretary_triage
tools.description: Sort inbox items into Now / Today / This Week / Defer buckets with a one-line rationale per item.
